unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: You can have an ID card.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 字母联想法：I (我) 的 D (D开头，Document文件)，证明我身份的文件就是ID (身份证)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: You have to pay to go on trains.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法：发音类似“赔”。弄坏了别人的东西就要“赔”钱，也就是付款 pay。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: You can ride a bike on the road.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法：r (形状像一根草) + ide (谐音“爱的”) -> 我骑 (ride) 着我爱的自行车在草地上玩。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We could play football together.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词源联想法：could是can的过去式。c (看) + ould (谐音“我的”) -> 过去我“能”看我的球赛。注意字母L是不发音的哦！

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Last year, we were in Harbin for the winter holiday.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音联想法：holi (谐音“好礼”) + day (天)。收到好礼物的这一天，就是快乐的假期 (holiday)！

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: By the last day of the holiday, I was a good skier.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词缀记忆法：ski (滑雪) + er (表示人的后缀)。滑雪的人就是滑雪者 (skier)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: After the camp, we felt great.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法：c (看) + amp (谐音“俺铺”)。看，俺铺好的床铺，就在度假营地 (camp) 里！

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The summer camp is over.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 合成词记忆法：summer (夏天) + camp (营地) = 夏令营。夏天在营地里开心玩耍。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It was very hot and our training was hard.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词缀记忆法：train (火车/训练) + ing (名词后缀)。像火车一样不断循环往复地辛苦练习，就是在进行训练 (training)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: On the third day, we cooked lunch on our own.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法：th (咬舌音，数字3 three的开头) + ird (联想bird)。这是我第三 (third) 次看到这只小鸟 (bird)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Growing up means a lot
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法：谐音“谜暗”。这个谜语暗藏的“意思” (mean) 到底是什么呢？

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We sometimes fall.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法：发音类似“佛”。如果不小心摔倒 (fall) 的时候，大喊一声“阿弥陀佛”保佑不疼！

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What is the film about?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法：发音类似“飞马”。很多经典电影 (film) 开场经常有一个飞马的标志。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: He killed Simba's dad.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法：k (看) + ill (生病)。看他生病了，病毒快要把他弄死 (kill) 了。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: With his friends' help, Simba beat his uncle.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法：b (不) + eat (吃)。在打败 (beat) 敌人之前，我坚决不吃饭 (eat)！

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We all have to face difficulties and learn to grow up.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 趣味拼读法：difficult (困难的) 的名词形式。di (弟弟) + ffi (谐音“发发”) + cul (哭) + ty (谐音“涕”)。弟弟遇到难事 (difficulty)，发脾气哭得流鼻涕。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: How do you feel about growing up?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语拆解法：grow (生长) + up (向上)。像小树苗一样不断向上生长，就是长大 (growing up)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We go to the same school and we help each other.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 逻辑拆解法：each (每个) + other (另一个)。每一个人都在帮助另一个人，也就是大家“互相、彼此” (each other) 帮忙。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: At first, I was not good at it.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 逻辑拆解法：first是“第一，首先”，处在 (at) 事情第一的位置，自然就是“起初，一开始” (at first)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: On the third day, we cooked lunch on our own.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 逻辑拆解法：own有“自己的”意思。在 (on) 我们 (our) 自己的 (own) 力量掌控下，也就是“靠我们自己”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: But he never gave up.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 动作联想法：give (给) + up (向上)。举起双手，把手里的武器全向上交出去，表示投降、“放弃” (give up)。
